name: Fried Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the milk over the oysters and soak for 10 minutes.
2. Roll each oyster in a mixture of seasoned cornmeal or cracker crumbs.
3. Heat the vegetable shortening in a deep pan.
4. Fry the oysters quickly in very hot shortening until browned.
5. Drain well on paper towels before serving.
